title: FunctionCall
description: A predicted FunctionCall returned from the model that contains a string representing the FunctionDeclaration.name with the arguments and their values.

name.description: Required. The name of the function to call. Must be a-z, A-Z, 0-9, or contain underscores and dashes, with a maximum length of 63.

args.description: The function parameters and values in JSON object format.
